text: What should be done in case of a fire on board?

options.text: A) Let the wind follow the fire to reduce oxygen.
B) Let the stem be up against the wind.
C) Continue on course and speed.
D) Reduce speed, keep the fire zone leeward.

explanation: Maneuvering to keep the fire leeward ensures that the wind blows smoke and flames away from the rest of the ship, assisting the fire-fighting team.
